description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a striking black and white color palette and a prominent sloped shed roof. The front facade is dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious wraparound balcony with a sleek metal railing, providing ample natural light and outdoor living space. The structure sits on a raised platform with wooden decking, and the surrounding area is bordered by green landscaping. The side and rear elevations have a more solid appearance, with smaller, asymmetrically placed windows and a mix of black and white wall panels. The main entryway is recessed, accessible via a concrete path and steps, and is partially sheltered by the roof overhang. The overall form is geometric and minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern house with a sloped roof, large glass windows, and a wraparound balcony, finished in black and white with green landscaping. The design features clean lines, a raised wooden deck, and a recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black and white facade, large balcony with metal railing, and green landscaping along the base.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the sloped roof, recessed main entryway, and concrete path leading to the door.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid black wall, small asymmetrical windows, and a continuation of the green landscaping.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the expansive glass windows, wraparound balcony, and wooden deck area.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a single door, concrete steps, and a partial roof overhang
